name: Cretaceous Egypt rpg - Dino POV
description:
This is an Rpg Of Cretaceous Egypt in which you are a dinosaur

Programmed with accurate dinosaurs

Included dinosaurs:

  • Spinosaurus

  • Carcharodontosaurus

  • Tameryraptor

  • Aegyptosaurus

  • Paralititan

  • Deltadromeus

  • Ouranosaurus
creator: Totallyordinarypineapple123
